title: Moyamoya syndrome and persistent trigeminal artery: description of a case with Trisomy 21.

sections.title: Moyamoya syndrome and persistent trigeminal artery: description of a case with Trisomy 21.
sections.text: Moyamoya syndrome (MMS) represents a rare and still under-recognized cause of juvenile ischemic stroke in European populations. We describe the clinical and neuroradiological features of a caucasian adult affected with Trisomy 21 presenting with an ischemic stroke and finally diagnosed with MMS in addition to persistent trigeminal artery.
